ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the school belongs to */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., elementary, high school) */,
  "enrollment_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum enrollment capacity of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "district_office" TEXT /* Address of the district office */,
  "superintendent_name" TEXT /* Name of the superintendent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Current grade level of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student was enrolled in the district */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the student attends */,
  "guardian_name" TEXT /* Name of the student's guardian */,
  "disability_status" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the student has a disability */,
  "english_language_learner" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the student is an English language learner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of the attendance record */,
  "present" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the student was present */,
  "excused_absence" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the absence was excused */,
  "unexcused_absence" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the absence was unexcused */,
  "suspension_absence" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the absence was due to suspension */,
  "incomplete_study_absence" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the absence was due to incomplete independent study */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "attendance_code" TEXT /* Attendance code (e.g., P, A, E) */,
  "attendance_time" TEXT /* Time of attendance (for tardiness or early departure tracking) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_records_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "eligible_cumulative_enrollment" INTEGER /* Total number of students eligible for cumulative enrollment */,
  "count_of_students_with_absences" INTEGER /* Number of students with one or more absences */,
  "average_days_absent" REAL /* Average number of days absent per student */,
  "excused_absences_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of excused absences */,
  "unexcused_absences_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of unexcused absences */,
  "suspension_absences_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of absences due to suspension */,
  "incomplete_study_absences_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of absences due to incomplete independent study */,
  "attendance_rate" REAL /* Attendance rate (percentage of students present) */,
  "truant_rate" REAL /* Truancy rate (percentage of students with unexcused absences) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_summary_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the teacher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the teacher works at */,
  "classroom" TEXT /* Classroom or department the teacher is assigned to */,
  "subject_area" TEXT /* Subject area the teacher specializes in */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of teaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parents" (
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent or guardian */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the parent or guardian */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the parent or guardian */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the parent or guardian */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the parent or guardian */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship to the student (e.g., mother, father, guardian) */,
  "emergency_contact" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the parent is an emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parents_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent or guardian */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., absence, tardiness) */,
  "sent_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details or comments */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, text, phone call) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_notifications_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES parents ("parent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_notifications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance policy */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the policy applies to */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "policy_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the policy */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the policy becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the policy expires */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy (e.g., attendance, tardiness, truancy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_policies_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the report is for */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_reports_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "truant_students" (
  "truant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each truant student record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "truant_status" TEXT /* Current truant status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "truant_date" TEXT /* Date the student became truant */,
  "truant_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution or action taken for the truant student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("truant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_truant_students_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "truancy_meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each truancy meeting */,
  "truant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the truant student record */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the meeting */,
  "meeting_time" TEXT /* Time of the meeting */,
  "meeting_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the meeting */,
  "meeting_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome or action items from the meeting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_truancy_meetings_truant_id FOREIGN KEY ("truant_id") REFERENCES truant_students ("truant_id")
)
